title: Women of the World
director: Paolo Cavara, Gualtiero Jacopetti, Franco Prosperi
actors: Stefano Sibaldi, Belinda Lee, Peter Ustinov
plot: From love in the streets of Paris to death on the African plain, the acclaimed MONDO CANE masters turn their unflinching eye on all the things never before known - and never before shown - about WOMEN OF THE WORLD.
